users.name: referral_code
users.description: Used to onboard users through referrals.

users.name: referral_stats
users.description: List of objects containing referral statistics.

users.name: total_referrals
users.description: Number of users onboarded based on the referral code

users.name: verified_referrals
users.description: Number of users who have been verified.

users.name: last_referral_date
users.description: The most recent date a referral occurred.

users.name: referral_history
users.description: List of referral history objects containing detailed referral data.

users.name: user_id
users.description: Unique identifier of the referred user.

users.name: user_email
users.description: Email address of the referred user.

users.name: verified_at
users.description: Timestamp when the referral was verified.

users.name: status
users.description: Status of the referral (e.g., pending, verified)

session_tracking.name: task_id
session_tracking.description: Has the value of the particular task which is present.

session_tracking.name: tenant_id
session_tracking.description: The organization this session belongs to.

session_tracking.name: organization_name
session_tracking.description: Name of the organization.

session_tracking.name: user_id
session_tracking.description: Unique identifier of the user.

session_tracking.name: User_name
session_tracking.description: Name of the user who performs the session

session_tracking.name: project_id
session_tracking.description: The project ID associated with the session.

session_tracking.name: container_id
session_tracking.description: Value indicating if the session belongs to code generation or code maintenance.

session_tracking.name: service_type
session_tracking.description: Type of service, e.g., code generation, code query, deep query, interactive configuration, auto configuration, or code maintenance.

session_tracking.name: session_start
session_tracking.description: Timestamp when the session started.

session_tracking.name: session_end
session_tracking.description: Timestamp when the session ended.

session_tracking.name: status
session_tracking.description: Status of the session (active, completed, failed).

session_tracking.name: total_cost
session_tracking.description: Sum of all agent costs.

session_tracking.name: agent_costs
session_tracking.description: Object containing a list of agents and their respective costs

session_tracking.name: cost_history
session_tracking.description: Array of objects representing various agent costs and total costs for particular durations.

session_tracking.name: timestamp
session_tracking.description: Timestamp for this cost entry.

session_tracking.name: agent_costs
session_tracking.description: Costs for each agent at this timestamp.

session_tracking.name: total_cost
session_tracking.description: Total cost for this timestamp.

session_tracking.name: last_updated
session_tracking.description: Timestamp of the last update for this session.

session_tracking.name: session_data
session_tracking.description: Object containing session-specific data.

session_tracking.name: llm_model
session_tracking.description: Name of the LLM model currently used in this session.

session_tracking.name: session_name
session_tracking.description: Name of the particular session

session_tracking.name: description
session_tracking.description: Description for the particular session

session_tracking.name: platform
session_tracking.description: which platform is been used to perform the operation for ex : web

session_tracking.name: selected_repos
session_tracking.description: object containing the list of repositories used in code maintenance

session_tracking.name: all_repositories
session_tracking.description: Boolean: true if all repositories are selected, false if specific repositories are selected

session_tracking.name: repositories
session_tracking.description: Array containing IDs of selected repositories if all_repositories is false.

session_tracking.name: created_at
session_tracking.description: Timestamp when the session was created.

request_tracker.name: request_id
request_tracker.description: Unique identifier for the API request.

request_tracker.name: created_at
request_tracker.description: Timestamp when the request was created.

request_tracker.name: date_partition
request_tracker.description: Extracts the date (YYYY-MM-DD) from a datetime to organize or segment data by day.

request_tracker.name: hour_partition
request_tracker.description: Extracts the hour (0–23) from a datetime to organize or segment data by hour.

request_tracker.name: user_id
request_tracker.description: Unique identifier of the user making the request.

request_tracker.name: user_role
request_tracker.description: Role of the user (e.g., admin or user).

request_tracker.name: duration_ms
request_tracker.description: Duration of the request in milliseconds.

request_tracker.name: response_size_bytes
request_tracker.description: Content-Length from response headers, defaulting to 0 if missing.

request_tracker.name: user_agent
request_tracker.description: Browser or client user agent string.

request_tracker.name: has_valid_token
request_tracker.description: Boolean: true if the token is valid, false otherwise.

request_tracker.name: project_id
request_tracker.description: ID of the project related to the request.

request_tracker.name: resource_type
request_tracker.description: Type of resource (e.g., users, projects, tasks).

request_tracker.name: action_type
request_tracker.description: Determine the action type based on HTTP method and path

request_tracker.name: bypass_credit_check
request_tracker.description: Value from "Bypass-Credit-Check" header, default empty string if not present

request_tracker.name: query_params
request_tracker.description: Object containing all query parameter keys and their values.

request_tracker.name: tags
request_tracker.description: Array of tags categorizing requests by method, response status, resource type, and user role.

app_deployments.name: app_id
app_deployments.description: Unique identifier for the deployed application.

app_deployments.name: app_url
app_deployments.description: Publicly accessible URL of the deployed application

app_deployments.name: artifact_path
app_deployments.description: Storage path or location of the deployment artifacts (e.g., build files, images).

app_deployments.name: branch_name
app_deployments.description: The Git branch from which the deployment was created.

app_deployments.name: build_path
app_deployments.description: Path to the build directory containing compiled application files.

app_deployments.name: command
app_deployments.description: Build command executed for deployment (e.g., npm run build).

app_deployments.name: created_at
app_deployments.description: Timestamp when the deployment was created.

app_deployments.name: custom_domain
app_deployments.description: Custom domain mapped to the deployed application, if configured.

app_deployments.name: deployment_id
app_deployments.description: Unique identifier for the deployment instance.

app_deployments.name: job_id
app_deployments.description: Identifier of the deployment job or process execution.

app_deployments.name: message
app_deployments.description: Additional message or notes related to the deployment

app_deployments.name: project_id
app_deployments.description: project id associated with the deployment.

app_deployments.name: project_name
app_deployments.description: Name of the project associated with the deployment.

app_deployments.name: root_path
app_deployments.description: Root directory path from which the deployment files are served.

app_deployments.name: status
app_deployments.description: Current status of the deployment (e.g., success, failed, in-progress).

app_deployments.name: subdomain
app_deployments.description: Auto-generated subdomain assigned to the deployment.

app_deployments.name: task_id
app_deployments.description: Particular task where the deployment happend for the project

app_deployments.name: tenant_id
app_deployments.description: Organization id associated with the deployment.

app_deployments.name: tenant_name
app_deployments.description: Organization name associated with the deployment.

app_deployments.name: updated_at
app_deployments.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to the deployment.

app_deployments.name: artifact_count
app_deployments.description: Number of artifacts generated or uploaded during deployment.

app_deployments.name: domain_status
app_deployments.description: Status of the custom domain (e.g., verified, pending, failed).

app_deployments.name: domain_checked_at
app_deployments.description: Timestamp when the custom domain was last verified or checked.
